Datenerhebung und Fehlerquellen

Lorenz Alban Oehler

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0

## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1

## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()

library(reactable)
library(haven)
library(VIM)
## Loading required package: colorspace
## Loading required package: grid

library(sjPlot)

## Attaching package: 'sjPlot'

##     set_theme
library(lme4)
## Loading required package: Matrix

## Attaching package: 'Matrix'

## The following objects are masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     expand, pack, unpack
library(ggeffects)
library(srvyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'srvyr'
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter

processing

loading

dat_raw <- readRDS("../data/ESS_germany_selection.RDS")

dat_raw |> nrow()
## [1] 36845

use weights

dat_weighted <- dat_raw |> 
  as_survey_design(weights = pspwght)

Visualizations

basic model

ggplot(dat_raw, aes(x = agea, y = stflife)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x + I(x^2), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Overall life satisfaction by Age",
       x = "Age", y = "Life satisfaction") +
  geom_jitter(alpha = .01) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Removed 784 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Warning: Removed 784 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

age-trend

plot <- dat_weighted |> 
  group_by(agea) |> 
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = survey_mean(.data[["stflife"]], na.rm = TRUE))

plot_selected <- plot[plot$agea < 90,]

p1 <- ggplot(plot_selected, aes(x = agea, y = mean)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(
    ymin = mean - mean_se,
    ymax = mean + mean_se
  ), width = 0.2) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(6,9)) +
  theme_minimal()

p1
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

ggsave(p1,
       filename = "../output/lineplot_lebenszufriedenheit-01.png",
       device = "png",
       dpi = 300,
       width = 8,
       height = 5,
       units = "in")
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

differentiated by survey wave

plot_grouped <- dat_weighted |> 
  filter(agea < 90) |> 
  mutate(age_group = cut(agea, 
                         breaks = seq(15, 90, by = 5), 
                         right = FALSE, 
                         labels = seq(15, 85, by = 5))) |> 
  group_by(age_group, years) |> 
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = survey_mean(.data[["stflife"]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) 

plot_grouped <- plot_grouped[plot_grouped$n >50,]

## dogde definieren
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.4)

# 2. Plotten
p2 <- ggplot(plot_grouped, aes(x = age_group, y = mean, 
                         color = as.factor(years), 
                         group = years)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = pd) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, position = pd) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - mean_se, ymax = mean + mean_se), 
                width = .5, alpha = 0.5, position = pd) +
  labs(title = "Lebenszufriedenheit im Altersverlauf nach ESS-Wellen",
       x = "Alter (5-Jahres-Intervalle)",
       y = "Mittelwert Lebenszufriedenheit",
       color = "Erhebungswellen") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(6,9)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Spectral", name = "Erhebungswellen") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Spectral", name = "Erhebungswellen") + 
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Erhebungswellen") +
  theme_minimal()
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
p2

ggsave(p2,
       filename = "../output/lineplot_lebenszufriedenheit-02.png",
       device = "png",
       dpi = 300,
       width = 8,
       height = 5,
       units = "in")

# library(plotly)
# ggplotly(p2)

# plot_grouped |> reactable()

numeric analysis for text

age effects

diff_jugend_mitte <- plot_grouped %>%
  filter(age_group %in% c(15, 50)) %>%
  group_by(years) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_15 = mean[age_group == 15],
    mean_50 = mean[age_group == 50],
    diff = mean[age_group == 50] - mean[age_group == 15]) %>%
  arrange(diff)

diff_jugend_mitte |> round(2) |> reactable(compact = T,filterable = T, defaultPageSize = 11)
# 2. Differenz zwischen 50 und 80 Jahren pro Welle
diff_mitte_alter <- plot_grouped %>%
  filter(age_group %in% c(50, 80)) %>%
  group_by(years) %>%
  # Da nicht alle Wellen bis 85 gehen (wegen n > 50), nehmen wir den höchsten verfügbaren Wert
  summarise(
        mean_50 = mean[age_group == 50],
        mean_80 = mean[age_group == 80],
        diff = mean[age_group == 80] - mean[age_group == 50]) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff))

diff_mitte_alter |> round(2) |> reactable(compact = T,filterable = T, defaultPageSize = 11)

period effects

vergleich_04_16 <- plot_grouped %>%
  filter(years %in% c(2004, 2016)) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  summarise(
    value_2016 = mean[years == 2016],
    value_2004 = mean[years == 2004],
    diff_16_minus_04 = mean[years == 2016] - mean[years == 2004]
  ) 
vergleich_04_16[,2:4]  <- vergleich_04_16[,2:4] |> round(2)
vergleich_04_16 |> reactable(compact = T,filterable = T, defaultPageSize = 11)

differentiated by cohort

time <- "years"

plot_grouped <- dat_weighted |> 
  # filter(agea < 90) |> 
  mutate(cohort_group = cut(birth_year, 
                         breaks = seq(1920, 2010, by = 10), 
                         right = FALSE, 
                         labels = seq(1920, 2000, by = 10))) |> 
  group_by(.data[[time]], cohort_group) |> 
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = survey_mean(.data[["stflife"]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
    ) 

plot_grouped <- plot_grouped[!is.na(plot_grouped$cohort_group),]

plot_grouped[plot_grouped$n |> order(),]
## manuelle Farbzuweisung
# colors <- setNames(c("red","green", "blue", "orange", "black","darkblue","purple","yellow","grey"),
#                    unique(plot_grouped$cohort_group))

fun.plot_cohort <- function(
    data = plot_grouped,
    x = "years",
    y = "mean",
    group  = "cohort_group",
    errorbars = "mean_se"
    ){

ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x]], y = .data[[y]], 
                         color = as.factor(.data[[group]]), 
                         group = .data[[group]])) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, alpha = .7) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = .data[[y]] - .data[[errorbars]],
                    ymax = .data[[y]] + .data[[errorbars]]), 
                width = .4, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Lebenszufriedenheit nach Altersgruppen und ESS-Wellen",
       x = "Jahr der Erhebung",
       y = "Mittelwert Lebenszufriedenheit",
       color = "Geburtskohorte") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(6,9)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Spectral", name = "Geburtskohorte") +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Spectral", name = "Geburtskohorte") +
    scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "Geburtskohorte") +
    # scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}


p3 <- fun.plot_cohort(data = plot_grouped[plot_grouped$n > 50,])
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
p3

ggsave(p3,
       filename = "../output/lineplot_lebenszufriedenheit-03.png",
       device = "png",
       dpi = 300,
       width = 8,
       height = 5,
       units = "in")

# library(plotly)
# ggplotly(p3)
plot_grouped |> reactable(filterable = T,compact = T)
kohorten_check <- plot_grouped %>%
  filter(cohort_group %in% c(1960, 1990), n > 50) %>%
  select(years, cohort_group, mean) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = cohort_group, names_prefix = "cohort_", values_from = mean) %>%
  mutate(diff = cohort_1990 - cohort_1960)


kohorten_check |> round(2) |> reactable(compact = T,filterable = T, defaultPageSize = 11)
perioden_check <- plot_grouped %>%
  filter(years %in% c(2008,2010,2012)) %>%
  group_by(cohort_group) %>%
  filter() %>% # Nur Kohorten, die in beiden Jahren Daten haben
  summarise(
    mean_2008 = mean[years == 2008],
    mean_2010 = mean[years == 2010],
    mean_2012 = mean[years == 2012],
    diff_08_10 = mean[years == 2010] - mean[years == 2008],
    diff_10_12 = mean[years == 2012] - mean[years == 2010]
    )

perioden_check[,2:6] <- perioden_check[,2:6] |> round(2)
perioden_check|> reactable(compact = T,filterable = T, defaultPageSize = 11)
